ul.li: Header (Purple): Structure metadata and control fields.
Green Segment: ProcFS raw string buffer for kernel-to-user reporting.
Alignment: Note that id_map_extent_t is 12 bytes; array indexing assumes no padding between elements in id_map_t.
Cache Optimization: extent_count is positioned at 0x3C to remain within the first 64B cache line alongside the most active extents.
